title: senecio gamolepoides
intro: Senecio gamolepoides, also known as Gamolepis senecio, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is a shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Senecio gamolepoides include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
